updated_label: Updated from AtlasOps source library and product router

items.title: Agent skills are becoming productized workflows
items.business_takeaway: Buyers need searchable cards, categories, and clear outcomes before they trust an agent workflow product.

items.title: RAG workflows need validation before claims ship
items.business_takeaway: RAG is a sellable workflow category when source selection, retrieval planning, and validation are visible.
items.related_offer: Agentic RAG Source Bundle Tool Pack

items.title: Checkout success is not payment evidence
items.business_takeaway: Downloadable products need signed payment evidence before delivery tokens or emails are released.

items.title: Coding agents need context before action
items.business_takeaway: Agent buyers feel the pain when tools edit without architecture, ownership, tests, or blast-radius checks.

items.title: Social publishing needs pre-composer controls
items.business_takeaway: Bad drafts, empty composers, duplicate posts, and unsupported publish claims need to be blocked before platform actions.

items.title: Agent tool updates need rollback and doctor checks
items.business_takeaway: Integration updates should require version checks, doctor checks, rollback notes, and teaching before they are treated as complete.

items.title: Agent Skill Packs are operational infrastructure
items.business_takeaway: The Guardrail Store now explains packs as checks, blockers, evidence rules, SKILL.md files, AGENTS.md files, QA contracts, and delivery policies.

items.title: Bundle paths clarify what to buy first
items.business_takeaway: Builder, Social Publisher, Revenue Agent, OpenClaw + Codex, and Agent Company bundles group related controls without fake discounts.

items.title: Ask Atlas can recommend a pack by failure mode
items.business_takeaway: Buyers can describe the workflow problem and see a recommended kit, bundle, setup review path, and exact payment gate.

items.title: Stripe Checkout still does not unlock delivery by itself
items.business_takeaway: The buyer flow keeps delivery locked until signed Stripe payment evidence matches order metadata.

items.title: Sales drafts stay draft-only until platform proof exists
items.business_takeaway: LinkedIn and X sales copy can be prepared safely without claiming posts or metrics.
